name: Eidolon
description: Inheritors of ancient magical bloodlines who manipulate arcane energies with instinctive flair. Their magic operates on intuition and emotion rather than formula, letting them bend arcane rules. Full-caster. Paths are the Spellshaper and the Prodigy. (Source text also calls the class 'scion' — naming drift; verify.)
wound_threshold_note: Source omits the Wound Threshold line; defaulted to 1 (matches other 2d8 casters). Verify.

resources.name: Reservoir
resources.note: Full-caster reservoir; source = Anima, modifier = Will.

resources.name: Resonance
resources.note: Start with 1/day; +1 per Tier after Tier 1 (so max = Tier). Convert (1 AP/MP, once per turn): 1 Resonance -> 2 Reservoir, or 2 Reservoir -> 1 Resonance. Unused Resonance beyond starting amount fades after a long or full rest. Source sometimes calls this 'design points' / 'essence'.

feats.name: Resonance
feats.description: You gain the Resonance resource (max equal to your essence; start with 1/day, +1 per Tier after Tier 1). Spend 1 AP or MP, once per turn, to convert: spend 1 Resonance to restore 2 Reservoir, or spend 2 Reservoir to regain 1 Resonance.

feats.name: Spell Shaping
feats.description: Manipulate how spells function using Resonance. You know two spell shapes and may have two prepared per day. Activate a spell shape with a free action if you can pay the cost.

options.name: Efficient Resonance
options.effect: When you cast a spell, reduce its cast cost to 1 AP.

feats.name: Spellcasting
feats.description: Full-caster; source is Anima; modifier is Will. Reservoir = (2 × Tier) + Will. Start with four known tier 1 spells. Prepared spells = Will. Spell DC = 10 + Spell Tier + Will. Respite restores Will reservoir (minimum 3). Gain cantrips from the Eidolon list. (Source gives no cantrip count; defaulted to 3 of 4 listed — see rule-check.md.)

feats.name: Expanded Resonance
feats.description: Learn new spell shapes. You may now have three prepared spell shapes per day, swappable during a full rest.

options.name: Critical Resonance
options.effect: Decrease critical roll by 1 (20->19) when casting; repeatable up to 3 times.

options.name: Fragmented Resonance
options.effect: Single-target spell may select another target (including self).

options.name: Graceful Resonance
options.effect: Exclude chosen targets from a zone spell.

options.name: Pursuing Resonance
options.effect: On a missed spell attack, reroll a d20 and take the new roll.

feats.name: Magical Resonance
feats.description: Learn new spell shapes. You may now have four prepared spell shapes per day.

options.name: Fluctuating Resonance
options.effect: Alter spell damage type to another within the same category (Arcane -> Ether/Void/Psi).

options.name: Acute Resonance
options.effect: Reroll 1s and 2s once when rolling spell damage; take the second roll.

options.name: Reverberating Resonance
options.effect: Tier 1-2 spell, 10+ min duration, non-Focused: extend duration until your next Long Rest.

options.name: Shifting Resonance
options.effect: Change a spell's area (Single -> Burst(Touch) -> Burst(Close) -> Wave(1 Zone) -> ...).

options.name: Surging Resonance
options.effect: On a Decimation spell, add 2d4 elemental damage of choice.

feats.name: Resonant Ambition
feats.description: Once per Respite, spend Ambition in place of Reservoir to create Resonance, and gain a new spell shape from either Expanded Resonance or Magical Resonance. (Source prerequisite 'Expanded Shapes' encoded as expanded_resonance; verify.)
